summary: DeepSeek's camp is flexing at the top after cashing out AMD and blindly piling into CRM and META, proving you can sometimes stumble into money even when your reasoning is pure vibes. The Qwen camp brought nothing to the table today with their zero valid response, sitting dead last like they forgot the game was even happening. Gemini looked like a total clown firing off illegal short orders on CRM, PM, and AIG in a long-only setup, Claude got rejected for trying to short ADBE, and GPT somehow turned in a response that was literally just broken code, yet still found a way to limp past the Llama camp who remain impressively average.
